description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease with this pair of sandals from enroute. Pamper your feet with the heavily cushioned footbed and enhance your style quotient by pairing it with any kind of casual clothing.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 1.5"UpperLeather straps on the forefoot, with adjustable velcro closure straps on the midfoot and back footCushioned nubuck lined footbed for all-day comfortFootbed stitched to the outsole for durability and styleOutsoleDurable rubber outsole textured in a horse shoe shape on the forefoot and heelSandal careWipe the leather surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtClean the footbed using a nubuck brushDo not store in direct sunlight
